intro: Gerascanthus colimensis is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments. Gerascanthus colimensis contains bioactive constituents including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
